definition: type or existence of a magnetic filter

definition_ml.en: type or existence of a magnetic filter
definition_ml.fr: type ou existence d'un filtre magnétique

note: Magnetic filters are required when process measuring devices with magnetized components are used in conjunction with media which can contain fine magnetic particles

note_ml.en: Magnetic filters are required when process measuring devices with magnetized components are used in conjunction with media which can contain fine magnetic particles
note_ml.de: Magnetfilter sind notwendig, wenn Prozessmessinstrumente mit magnetisierten Komponenten zusammen mit Medien verwendet werden, die feine magnetische Partikel enthalten können
